Video.summary: Eddie is desperate to prove he has not cheated on Luz; engaged Renesha and Lemuel accuse each other of infidelity.
Video.title: Is He Hiding Secrets in His Phone?

Image.alt: Is He Hiding Secrets in His Phone?
Is He Hiding Secrets in His Phone?
Is He Hiding Secrets in His Phone?

Video.summary: Felicia is here to confront her boyfriend and her mother who have been sleeping together for months! Next Susan must come clean to her boyfriend and tell him she's prostituting again!
Video.title: Brawlin' Broads!

Video.summary: Michael and Flora are no longer dating, but they have a 3 year old daughter together. Michael thinks that Flora’s boyfriend Dwayne is abusing his daughter, but is he telling the truth? Watch Steve get to the bottom of this!
Video.title: 3 Year Old Locked in the Basement

Image.alt: 3 Year Old Locked in the Basement
3 Year Old Locked in the Basement
3 Year Old Locked in the Basement

Video.summary: A woman cheats with a little person she met at a chicken fight; a waffle waitress has an illicit affair with one of her customers.
Video.title: One Night Stands

Video.summary: Fefe confronts the strippers with whom her boyfriend had a threesome; stripper Monet teaches her competitive new co-worker a lesson by sleeping with her boyfriend; Cayenne meets a dancer he follows on Instagram.
Video.title: Stripnotized

Video.summary: Summer feels no remorse for having sex with her best friend's boyfriend; Simone confirms that she has something going on with her boyfriend's uncle; Travis' budding career as a hip-hop performer gets in the way of his relationship with Marissa.
Video.title: Ice Cold Breakups

Video.summary: Destiny admits to cheating on her live-in boyfriend with a one-night stand; an all-out battle ensues after Kashe confesses to hooking up with her cousin's girlfriend; two men challenge each other to an eating contest to win Amber.
Video.title: Chronic Cheaters

Video.summary: A man cheats with his girlfriend's cousin; a man cheats on his wife with his ex-lover.
Video.title: Unemployed Men Vs. Angry Gals

Video.summary: A woman sleeps with her brother; a woman leaves her controlling husband; a woman sleeps with her husband's sister; a man impregnates his mistress.
Video.title: My Brother Is My Lover

Video.summary: Candice confronts Nikki for sleeping with her man. Mike suspects Moon has been cheating with 2 people.
Video.title: I Have a Surprise...I'm Cheating!

Video.summary: Carla tells her boyfriend she's cheating on him. Jay wants to tell Nikki she slept with her lover Crystal.
Video.title: Guess What? I'm Cheating

Video.summary: It’s the battle of the exes! Tony fights to get her ex-lover back. Richard reveals cheating on his wife.
Video.title: I Can't Stop Loving You

Video.summary: Josh teaches Danny a lesson about respecting women. Nicole is here to have it out with her sister.
Video.title: Return of the Past Guests Part 1

Image.alt: Return of the Past Guests Part 1
Return of the Past Guests Part 1
Return of the Past Guests Part 1

Video.summary: Scott and Dawn want their sister Betty to leave her abusive boyfriend Michael of 11 months. Michael says Betty abuses him, too, but Scott and Dawn don’t believe him. The drama will explode when Scott confronts Michael on our stage today!
Video.title: Do Not Touch Her on My Stage

Image.alt: Do Not Touch Her on My Stage
Do Not Touch Her on My Stage
Do Not Touch Her on My Stage

Video.summary: Kelsey says her husband is abusing her. Malcolm believes that Kelsey has been cheating on him since the beginning and that their two kids may belong to another man. Plus, Carrie's boyfriend Chris thinks their child belongs to her ex.
Video.title: If I Don't Hit Her, She Doesn't Listen

Image.alt: If I Don't Hit Her, She Doesn't Listen
If I Don't Hit Her, She Doesn't Listen
If I Don't Hit Her, She Doesn't Listen

Video.summary: A year ago, Jessica confessed to violently shaking her infant son and causing him severe brain injuries. But now Jessica has recanted and claims that a sippy cup caused his injuries. Be sure to tune in to hear the truth!
Video.title: If You Didn't Shake Your Son, Why Did You Confess?

Image.alt: If You Didn't Shake Your Son, Why Did You Confess?
If You Didn't Shake Your Son, Why Did You Confess?
If You Didn't Shake Your Son, Why Did You Confess?

Video.summary: Robert believes his daughter is being abused and molested by her stepfather, John, but John and Tiffany denies any abuse. Is Tiffany covering for John’s abuse? See the shocking lie detector test today!
Video.title: A Father's Fight for His Daughter

Image.alt: A Father's Fight for His Daughter
A Father's Fight for His Daughter
A Father's Fight for His Daughter

Video.summary: Laharla caught her mother's boyfriend Victor cheating when she saw him through their window. Then, Aaron claims that a woman named Olivia will not leave him alone after they met in person.
Video.title: I Saw You Through The Window

Image.alt: I Saw You Through The Window
I Saw You Through The Window
I Saw You Through The Window

Video.summary: Amber may not be the best mother, but her abusive boyfriend Alex is making their relationship and her son's upbringing, even worse. Then, David is desperate to get his kids back from ex-wife Fawn, who alleges David was an abusive father.
Video.title: He Beat Me In My Sleep/He Pulled A Gun On Me

Image.alt: He Beat Me In My Sleep/He Pulled A Gun On Me
He Beat Me In My Sleep/He Pulled A Gun On Me
He Beat Me In My Sleep/He Pulled A Gun On Me

Video.summary: Will the lie detector results reveal if Tamisha and Simone’s men were faithful? Or something more sinister?
Video.title: I Wouldn't Wish This on Anybody

Image.alt: I Wouldn't Wish This on Anybody
I Wouldn't Wish This on Anybody
I Wouldn't Wish This on Anybody

Video.summary: George thinks his girlfriend is sleeping with her daughter's boyfriend; Adam says Tiffany has been trying for six years to trick him into confessing that he has been cheating on her.
Video.title: I Know She's Cheating With Her Daughter's Boyfriend

Image.alt: I Know She's Cheating With Her Daughter's Boyfriend
I Know She's Cheating With Her Daughter's Boyfriend
I Know She's Cheating With Her Daughter's Boyfriend

Video.summary: Violet's baby was brutally beaten to death by a caretaker; David says his estranged wife's story did not add up after their daughter suffered severe injuries.
Video.title: You Had to Know Your Child Was Being Abused!

Image.alt: You Had to Know Your Child Was Being Abused!
You Had to Know Your Child Was Being Abused!
You Had to Know Your Child Was Being Abused!

Video.summary: Hear from girls who say that they were lured away by a stranger they met online.
Video.title: Lured Away

Video.summary: Fed up moms want their violent daughters to stop abusing them and thier siblings on today's dramatic episode.
Video.title: Minors Out Of Control

Video.summary: Frightened mothers express the pain their teenage daughters are putting them through.
Video.title: Tough Teens

Video.summary: Sally speaks with men and women who have gone through enormous physical changes over the years.
Video.title: Frumpy to Fabulous

Video.summary: Children appear on today's show to ask for help with their mother's embarrassing revealing attire.
Video.title: Why Mom?

Video.summary: Why do these new moms feel it necessary to protect their babies from grandma?
Video.title: Mom, Stay Away from My Kids

Image.alt: Mom, Stay Away from My Kids
Mom, Stay Away from My Kids
Mom, Stay Away from My Kids

Video.summary: Dysfunctional families confront the root of the problem with Sally’s help on today’s heavily dramatic episode.
Video.title: Psycho Mother-in-law

Video.summary: Girlfriends confront their boyfriends who dumped them because they refused to get abortions and refuse to be involved in the baby’s life.
Video.title: Pregnant Ultimatums

Video.summary: These moms seek help from Sally for their troubling teenagers.
Video.title: My Teen is Going to End Up a Criminal

Image.alt: My Teen is Going to End Up a Criminal
My Teen is Going to End Up a Criminal
My Teen is Going to End Up a Criminal

Video.summary: These men think they are gifts from God. They are about to be humbled.
Video.title: Stud or Dud?
